summary: Iteration 153: Verified 3 bug fixes - 1) captureFrame() await fix in VehicleWeight.jsx, 2) WhatsApp image sending to individual numbers in Python backend, 3) Carry-forward endpoint in Python backend. All backend tests pass (9/9). Frontend UI verified - Settings > Stock tab shows Opening Stock section with 'Auto Carry Forward' button (data-testid='carry-forward-btn').
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: VehicleWeight.jsx lines 540, 541, 565, 566, 617, 618, 630, 631 - All captureFrame() calls now use 'await' keyword correctly
PASS: vehicle_weight.py lines 248-259 - WhatsApp auto-notify now sends images to individual numbers when no group is configured (loop through numbers with image URLs)
PASS: auth.py lines 257-302 - POST /api/opening-stock/carry-forward endpoint implemented with admin role check, source/target year validation, stock summary calculation
PASS: desktop-app/routes/auth.js lines 157-277 - Carry-forward endpoint implemented with full stock calculation logic matching Python backend
PASS: local-server/routes/auth.js lines 138-258 - Carry-forward endpoint implemented identically to desktop-app (triple backend parity)
PASS: Settings.jsx line 458 - Carry Forward button has data-testid='carry-forward-btn'

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Login, Settings navigation, Stock tab, Carry Forward button all verified

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: 1) captureFrame() in VehicleWeight.jsx now uses await - prevents Promise objects being sent as image data. 2) WhatsApp auto-notify in vehicle_weight.py sends images to individual numbers (lines 255-259). 3) Carry-forward endpoint exists in all 3 backends (Python auth.py, desktop-app auth.js, local-server auth.js). Frontend button at Settings > Stock tab with data-testid='carry-forward-btn'. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_carry_forward.py cover: admin role requirement, source/target year validation, successful carry-forward, GET verification.

features_tested.stock_tab_visible: PASS - Stock tab shows Opening Stock section
features_tested.captureFrame_await_fix: PASS - Code review confirms await added at lines 540, 541, 565, 566, 617, 618, 630, 631
features_tested.whatsapp_image_individual_numbers: PASS - Code review confirms image sending loop at lines 255-259

captureFrame_fix.issue: captureFrame() is async but was called without await, causing Promise objects to be sent as image data
captureFrame_fix.fix: Added 'await' to all captureFrame() calls at lines 540, 541, 565, 566, 617, 618, 630, 631

whatsapp_image_fix.issue: Images were only sent to WhatsApp groups, not individual numbers
whatsapp_image_fix.fix: Added loop at lines 255-259 to send images to each individual number when no group is configured

carry_forward_endpoint.features: Admin role check, source/target year validation, stock summary calculation, auto_carried flag
